types.wikimacro: {{tabletree #entry="${entryid}" orderby="entryorder_up,field_up:file_number,date_up,name_up" message="" showSize="false" showCreateDate="false" showDate="false" headerStyle="font-size:120%;" textStyle="font-size:120%;" iconWidth="22px" toggleStyle="font-size:22px;" columns=name,date,attachments showAttachments=true showThumbnails=false metadataDisplay1="archive_keyword:header=Keywords:separator=;" metadataDisplay2="archive_subject:header=Subjects:separator=;" metadataDisplay3="archive_note:template={attr1}\: {attr2}" }}

type.name: type_archive_section

types.wiki:
+section title="{{typename wrap=true}}: {{name wrap=true}}" +center {{display_simplesearch width=200px inputSize=100% ancestor=this placeholder="Search" orderBy=createdate_ascending }} -center +row +col-8 +toggleopen Details {{description wikify="true"}}
+skip {{properties propertyToggleLimit=100 message="" metadata.types="archive_note" checkTextLength="true" headingClass="formgroupheader" layout="linear" includeTitle="true" separator="" decorate="false" inherited="false" }} -skip
{{typename}} Information
{{information showDetails="true" showTitle="false" }}
{{properties propertyToggleLimit=100 message="" metadata.types="!tag:archiveinternal,!tag:internal" headingClass="formgroupheader" layout="linear" includeTitle="true" separator="" decorate="false" inherited="false" }}
:vspace 1em -toggle ---- :vspace 1em {{macro id=archive_table}} +skip {{tabletree message="" showSize="false" showCreateDate="false" showDate="false" headerStyle="font-size:120%;" textStyle="font-size:120%;" iconWidth="22px" toggleStyle="font-size:22px;" columns=name,date,attachments showAttachments=true showThumbnails=false metadataDisplay1="archive_keyword:header=Keywords:separator=;" metadataDisplay2="archive_subject:header=Subjects:separator=;" metadataDisplay3="archive_note:xattr1=Arrangement:template={attr1}_colon_ {attr2}" }} -skip -col +col-4 +center {{archive_finding_aid_link}} -center +if anonymous=false +center {{new_entry fromEntry="true" class="ramadda-button-small" message=""}} -center {{new_property fromEntry="true" showToggle="true" class="ramadda-button-small" addEditPropertiesLink="true"}} {{name message="" link=true prefix="" entry="ancestor:type:type_archive_collection"}} {{name message="" link=true prefix="" entry="ancestor:type:type_archive_series"}} {{name message="" link=true prefix="" entry="ancestor:type:type_archive_file"}}
Collection: " suffix="
Series: " suffix="
File: " suffix="
+center {{barcode field=barcode message=""}} -center -if +center {{image inherited="true" showCaption=true message="" width="80%" style="margin-bottom:10px;" useThumbnail="true" showPlaceholderImage=true}} -center {{properties message="" inherited="true" metadata.types="content.license" includeTitle=false}} {{properties propertyToggleLimit=100 message="" metadata.types="tag:archiveinternal" checkTextLength="true" headingClass="formgroupheader" layout="linear" includeTitle="true" separator="" decorate="false" inherited="false" }} :vspace 1em {{mapentry hideIfNoLocations=true width="100%" height="200px"}} :vspace 1em {{list includeIcon="true" details="false" entries="siblings,links" message="" box.maxheight="200" xbox.class="entry-sidebox" prefix="====Related====" xblock.show="true" xblock.title="Related" xblock.open="false"}} -col -row -section

type.name: type_archive_collection
type.children: <entries> <entry name="Series 1" type="type_archive_series" id="series1"/> <entry name="File 1" type="type_archive_file" parent="series1"/> </entries>

type.name: type_archive_item
